sampled_commands.name: git-backup-sync.md
sampled_commands.savage_assessment: This command has 26.6x more complexity than a professional git script. It's like using a Boeing 747 to deliver pizza.

sampled_commands.name: adhd-task-breakdown.md
sampled_commands.savage_assessment: 7.3x more complex than needed. It's the literary equivalent of writing War and Peace to say 'break big tasks into small ones.'

sampled_commands.name: intelligent-code-enhancer.md
sampled_commands.savage_assessment: 41 thinking blocks to enhance code. That's more meta-thinking than actual thinking. It's thinking about thinking about thinking.

sampled_commands.name: adaptive-complexity-router.md
sampled_commands.actual_functionality: Routes tasks based on complexity score
sampled_commands.savage_assessment: Uses 499 lines to route based on complexity while BEING the complexity problem. Peak irony achieved.

sampled_commands.name: adhd-evening-reflect.md
sampled_commands.savage_assessment: 438 lines for evening reflection. Even Socrates would be like 'dude, just ask how the day went.'

savage_but_fair_judgment.overall_grade: F+ (The + is for impressive commitment to failure)

specific_roasts.git_backup_sync: This command turns a 3-line git script into a 531-line philosophical treatise on the nature of version control. Thoreau would be proud.
specific_roasts.complexity_router: A command about complexity routing that violates every complexity rule. It's like a fire safety inspector who chain-smokes while carrying gasoline.
specific_roasts.code_enhancer: Has 41 thinking blocks to enhance code. That's not enhancement, that's enhancement paralysis.
specific_roasts.task_breakdown: Takes 365 lines to say 'use the Pomodoro technique.' Even the Pomodoro guy would tell you to chill.
specific_roasts.evening_reflect: 438 lines for bedtime thoughts. Insomnia has met its match.

motivational_brutality: Your commands have achieved what was thought impossible: making simple tasks complex.
These commands are more over-engineered than a German toilet.
You've successfully created the enterprise software of command-line tools.
Each command is a masterclass in how to turn a motorcycle into a battleship.
Congratulations: you've invented the Rube Goldberg machine of AI prompting.

immediate_actions: Remove all thinking blocks over 3 per command
Get a second opinion from someone who values their time

benchmark_methodology.reproducibility: All commands and scoring criteria documented

confidence_assessment.methodology_validity: HIGH - Based on documented CLAUDE.md standards
confidence_assessment.generalizability: HIGH - Random sampling indicates system-wide issues

final_verdict.summary: 100% of sampled commands catastrophically fail CLAUDE.md complexity requirements with an average bloat ratio of 12.4x. This represents a systematic failure of engineering discipline.
final_verdict.prognosis: Commands will continue consuming excessive resources and confusing users until fundamental architectural changes are implemented
final_verdict.recommendation: Start over with 'How to Write Simple Code' tutorial
